violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by a sanitizer bucket in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Bucket was removed from the sink basin during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Various food items were observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. Establishment shall date mark all food items prepared or handled in the kitchen space. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

Haddock filet and sea scallops were observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Food items were moved into refrigeration to complete the thawing process. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/14/2025

The door to the outside, located in the side entrance of the kitchen space, does not have a protective screen door. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. Establishment is to add a door to protect against entry of pests or leave the door closed during food preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 09/14/2025

The kitchen floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Kitchen floor was observed with missing portions of coating and subflooring was observed as well. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (slicer) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. PIC disassembled deli slicer and cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Establishment is to sanitize dishes in 3-bay sink after unloading from dishwasher. Call for service was placed during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2025
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on prep unit #2 by stove and fryolators. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025
The inside lining of the flip top of prep unit #1 located in the kitchen was not in good repair. Equipment shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/28/2025

The kitchen floor is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. Kitchen floor was observed with missing portions of coating and subflooring was observed as well. New Violation. Correct By: 01/29/2026
